div.h1: Counter Stress Test Data Flow & Memory Specification

p.strong: Scenario: N threads × M increments → Atomic Counter → Final Verification

ol.li: CAS overhead grows non-linearly with thread count due to retry loops.
Fetch-Add remains faster as it avoids branch prediction misses from retries.
Bus contention on the cache line is the primary bottleneck for both.

div.p: Protocol: MESI (Modified, Exclusive, Shared, Invalid) Contention: Cache line bounces between cores
